title: You Thief: Remastered Edition
description: Make villagers angry when their chests are opened by players, for those who like fun, immersive experience, challenge, and ARPG elements.
body:
**This mod is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!**

---
Also, This mod is a remastered version of [You Thief!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/you-thief!). This time, we made a more precise mechanic, waiting for you to challenge!

Now when you open or break the villagers' chests or barrels in the village, the villagers nearby will get angry and raise the trade prices extremely. 

The mechanic is based on the vanilla gossip system of villagers. So, if the iron golems hear what you did from the villagers, they will attack you too. You will also get a bad luck effect for a day. Now think twice about the consequences before you steal!

Location will be detected, you will only offend villagers and iron golems when opening chests/barrels in the village. Placing/opening/breaking your own chest/barrel will not offend villagers.

But...You plan to place a chest next to Villagers', and combine them into a big one? Nope.Nice try.The villagers are smart enough to know your trick. But they are kind of stupid, too.If you place your chest near a natrual generated chest, they cannot recognize that, so they may mistake it. Don't confuse them!

So, how to steal "correctly"? Think about how do you steal Piglins'! You can also try the magical way. Drink invisibility potion, be completly invisible, and you can do whatever you want!

## Feel a bit harsh? We made it rewarding to be a thief! Now the loots in village chests & barrels have been *doubled*!

This mod is not compatible with Lootr.

**Credits**
- Thank Heket for making this into a real mod!

- The cover is made with resource pack [Fresh Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX
